title: Neoantigen vaccine generates intratumoral T cell responses in phase Ib glioblastoma trial
indication_summary: Newly diagnosed MGMT-unmethylated glioblastoma; personalized multi-epitope synthetic long peptide neoantigen vaccine (poly-ICLC adjuvant) after surgical resection and radiotherapy

patients.quoted_text: Patient 1: vaccinated with personalized neoantigen SLP vaccine; required dexamethasone during vaccine priming; received priming vaccines but circulating immune responses not analysed (not among the five booster patients); died of progressive disease. Per-patient HLA genotype not reported (HLA typing performed for neoantigen target selection).
patients.vaccine_platform_detail: NeoVax: personalized neoantigen synthetic long peptides (up to 20, in pools A-D of 3-5) admixed with poly-ICLC; prime-boost

patients.quoted_text: Patient 2: personalized neoantigen SLP vaccine; required dexamethasone during priming; circulating responses not analysed; died of progressive disease. Per-patient HLA genotype not reported (HLA typing performed for target selection).
patients.vaccine_platform_detail: NeoVax: personalized neoantigen synthetic long peptides (up to 20, in pools A-D of 3-5) admixed with poly-ICLC; prime-boost

patients.quoted_text: Patient 3: personalized neoantigen SLP vaccine (includes EGFRvIII and frameshift NeoORF peptides); required dexamethasone during priming; underwent post-vaccination surgery; died of progressive disease. Per-patient HLA genotype not reported (HLA typing performed for target selection).
patients.vaccine_platform_detail: NeoVax: personalized neoantigen synthetic long peptides (up to 20, in pools A-D of 3-5) admixed with poly-ICLC; prime-boost

patients.quoted_text: Patient 4: personalized neoantigen SLP vaccine; required dexamethasone during vaccine priming and failed to generate IFNg ELISPOT responses; died of progressive disease. Per-patient HLA genotype not reported (HLA typing performed for target selection).
patients.vaccine_platform_detail: NeoVax: personalized neoantigen synthetic long peptides (up to 20, in pools A-D of 3-5) admixed with poly-ICLC; prime-boost

patients.quoted_text: Patient 5: personalized neoantigen SLP vaccine; required dexamethasone during vaccine priming and failed to generate IFNg ELISPOT responses; underwent post-vaccination surgery; died of progressive disease. Per-patient HLA genotype not reported (HLA typing performed for target selection).
patients.vaccine_platform_detail: NeoVax: personalized neoantigen synthetic long peptides (up to 20, in pools A-D of 3-5) admixed with poly-ICLC; prime-boost

patients.quoted_text: Patient 6: personalized neoantigen SLP vaccine; required dexamethasone during vaccine priming and failed to generate IFNg ELISPOT responses (diffuse early reactivity probably reflecting high baseline inflammation); died of progressive disease. Per-patient HLA genotype not reported (HLA typing performed for target selection).
patients.vaccine_platform_detail: NeoVax: personalized neoantigen synthetic long peptides (up to 20, in pools A-D of 3-5) admixed with poly-ICLC; prime-boost

patients.quoted_text: Patients 7 and 8 did not receive dexamethasone during vaccine priming and generated robust de novo polyfunctional neoantigen-specific CD4+ and CD8+ T cell responses. Patient 7 responded primarily to pool C, with CD4+ responses against mutated ARHGAP35 and GPC1 and CD8+ responses against ARHGAP35MUT and SLX4MUT; died of progressive disease. Per-patient HLA genotype not reported (HLA typing performed for target selection).
patients.vaccine_platform_detail: NeoVax: personalized neoantigen synthetic long peptides (up to 20, in pools A-D of 3-5) admixed with poly-ICLC; prime-boost

patients.quoted_text: Patient 8 did not receive dexamethasone during priming; showed ex vivo ELISPOT reactivity to pools A and B (pool C below threshold of 55 SFC per 1e6 PBMCs), with CD4+ responses against three neoepitopes (SHANK2, COX18, SVEP1); preferential targeting of mutant SHANK2 and SVEP1 over wild-type and equivalent reactivity to mutant vs wild-type COX18; died of progressive disease. Per-patient HLA genotype not reported (HLA typing performed for target selection).
patients.vaccine_platform_detail: NeoVax: personalized neoantigen synthetic long peptides (up to 20, in pools A-D of 3-5) admixed with poly-ICLC; prime-boost

pools.quoted_text: Patient 7 immunizing pool C (dominant responding pool)
Patient 8 immunizing pool A (ex vivo ELISPOT reactive)
Patient 8 immunizing pool B (ex vivo ELISPOT reactive)
Patient 8 immunizing pool C (responses below 55 SFC threshold)

evidence.quoted_text: patients 7 and 8 ... generated robust de novo immune responses against multiple predicted neoantigens as analysed using ex vivo ELISPOT (Fig. 2a). Patient 7 responded primarily to pool C peptides

provenance.quoted_text: Patient 7 responded primarily to pool C peptides

magnitude.raw: de novo IFNg ELISPOT response above 55 SFC/1e6 threshold; per-pool SFC in Fig. 2a (x10^2 SFC per 1e6 PBMCs, background-subtracted), value not tabulated

evidence.quoted_text: CD4+ T cell responses against mutated ARHGAP35 ... and preferential reactivity to mutant over wild-type peptides

provenance.quoted_text: CD4+ T cell responses against mutated ARHGAP35

magnitude.raw: mutant-preferential CD4+ IFNg response to ARHGAP35MUT; magnitude in Fig. 2b (SFC x10^2 per 1e6 PBMCs), value not tabulated

evidence.quoted_text: CD4+ T cell responses against mutated ARHGAP35 and GPC1 neoepitopes, and preferential reactivity to mutant over wild-type peptides

magnitude.raw: mutant-preferential CD4+ IFNg response to GPC1MUT; magnitude in Fig. 2b, value not tabulated

evidence.quoted_text: Lower frequency mutant-specific CD8+ T cell responses to predicted class I epitopes (EPT) that arose from mutated ARHGAP35 (ARHGAP35MUT) ... were detected following one round of in vitro stimulation in post-vaccination samples

provenance.quoted_text: mutant-specific CD8+ T cell responses ... ARHGAP35MUT

magnitude.raw: mutant-specific CD8+ response to ARHGAP35MUT class I epitope EPT12A after one round in vitro stimulation; value not tabulated

evidence.quoted_text: Lower frequency mutant-specific CD8+ T cell responses to predicted class I epitopes (EPT) that arose from ... mutated SLX4 (SLX4MUT) were detected following one round of in vitro stimulation in post-vaccination samples

magnitude.raw: mutant-specific CD8+ response to SLX4MUT class I epitope after one round in vitro stimulation; specific EPT not named, value not tabulated

evidence.quoted_text: Four of the strongest neoantigen-specific responses from patients 7 and 8 were confirmed to be against processed epitopes (Fig. 2c) ... reactivity of these cells against autologous B cells nucleofected with minigenes

provenance.quoted_text: directed against endogenously processed and presented peptides

evidence.assay_detail: CD8+ response to ARHGAP35MUT confirmed against minigene-expressed processed epitope

evidence.quoted_text: Dominant responses of CD4+ and CD8+ neoantigen-specific T cell lines from patients 7 and 8 are directed against endogenously processed and presented peptides ... nucleofected with minigenes (MG)
evidence.assay_detail: CD8+ response to SLX4MUT confirmed against minigene-expressed processed epitope

evidence.quoted_text: reactivity against tumour-fed dendritic cells was observed for ARHGAP35MUT CD4+ T cells and blocked with class II blocking antibodies, indicating that this epitope can be naturally processed and presented

provenance.quoted_text: reactivity against tumour-fed dendritic cells ... blocked with class II blocking antibodies

evidence.assay_detail: ARHGAP35MUT CD4+ reactivity to tumour-fed DCs, blocked by class II antibodies (natural processing/presentation)

evidence.quoted_text: CD8+ T cells from patient 7 that were specific to ARHGAP35MUT and SLX4MUT were able to detect minigene-expressed antigens, but did not recognize an autologous tumour cell line when analysed using a TNF ELISPOT

provenance.quoted_text: did not recognize an autologous tumour cell line

evidence.assay_detail: ARHGAP35MUT-specific CD8+ T cells failed to recognize autologous tumour cell line (TNF ELISPOT)

evidence.quoted_text: CD8+ T cells from patient 7 that were specific to ARHGAP35MUT and SLX4MUT ... did not recognize an autologous tumour cell line when analysed using a TNF ELISPOT

provenance.quoted_text: did not recognize an autologous tumour cell line

evidence.assay_detail: SLX4MUT-specific CD8+ T cells failed to recognize autologous tumour cell line (TNF ELISPOT)

evidence.quoted_text: Patient 8 demonstrated ex vivo ELISPOT reactivity against ASPs from two out of three immunizing peptide pools (pools A and B)

provenance.quoted_text: reactivity against ASPs from two out of three immunizing peptide pools (pools A and B)

magnitude.raw: ex vivo IFNg ELISPOT reactivity against pool A ASPs (above 55 SFC/1e6 threshold); magnitude in Fig. 2a, value not tabulated

evidence.quoted_text: Patient 8 demonstrated ex vivo ELISPOT reactivity against ASPs from two out of three immunizing peptide pools (pools A and B)

magnitude.raw: ex vivo IFNg ELISPOT reactivity against pool B ASPs (above 55 SFC/1e6 threshold); magnitude in Fig. 2a, value not tabulated

evidence.quoted_text: pool C responses were below the threshold of 55 spot-forming cells per 106 PBMCs

provenance.quoted_text: pool C responses were below the threshold of 55 spot-forming cells per 106 PBMCs

evidence.quoted_text: CD4+ T cell responses directed against three neoepitopes ... Preferential targeting of mutant SHANK2 (SHANK2MUT) ... over wild-type sequences

survival_outcomes.note: Median progression-free survival 7.6 months (90% confidence interval 6.2-9.5); all 8 vaccinated patients

source.quoted_text: Median progression-free survival and overall survival were 7.6 months and 16.8 months, respectively

survival_outcomes.note: Median overall survival 16.8 months (90% confidence interval 9.6-21.3); all 8 vaccinated patients died of progressive disease

source.quoted_text: Median progression-free survival and overall survival were 7.6 months and 16.8 months, respectively
